final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a "clean, bright, airy, feminine, floral accents with purple flowers" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Glossier DTC beauty editorial, Kinfolk magazine skincare photography, 2010s Japanese beauty brand web design (HACCI, THREE Cosmetics); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with three-column structure — left column (text content), center (model with product), right column (product display + stat cards), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: must include soft pink and white color palette, purple flower accents, clean minimal background
Lighting/mood: must be soft, bright, airy lighting — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink dominant, white, with purple flower accents
Materials/textures: must include floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents for stat cards, pill-shaped badges with small icons, pink checkmarks for bullet points
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), navigation links "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", CTA "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all Japanese text exactly as provided, must include 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges, 3 bullet points, 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards, 2 product items (serum dropper bottle + packaging box)
Avoid:
